"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:H/SI:H/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "Svelte was vulnerable to DOM clobbering of its internal framework state on elements, potentially leading to XSS attacks.

You are vulnerable if all of the following is true:
- you are using attribute spreading on a form element
- you are using attribute spreading or allow a dynamic value for the `name` attribute on an input or button element within that form
- both of these are simultaneously user-controllable

```svelte
<form {...spread1}>
  <input {...spread2}>
</form>
```", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00319, "percentile": 0.23653}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rcqx-6q8c-2c42", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-14T20:29:13Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rcqx-6q8c-2c42", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rcqx-6q8c-2c42"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42573"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-09T17:17:07Z", "published_at": "2026-05-14T20:29:13Z", "references": ["https://github.com/sveltejs/svelte/security/advisories/GHSA-rcqx-6q8c-2c42", "https://github.com/sveltejs/svelte/releases/tag/svelte%405.55.7", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42573", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rcqx-6q8c-2c42"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/sveltejs/svelte/security-advisories/GHSA-rcqx-6q8c-2c42", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/sveltejs/svelte", "summary": "Svelte Vulnerable to XSS via DOM Clobbering of Internal Framework State", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T18:41:30Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rcqx-6q8c-2c42", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.55.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "svelte"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 5.55.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Svelte Vulnerable to XSS via DOM Clobbering of Internal Framework State
